Delete a case attribute

Source: R/cases.R
qc_delete_case_attribute.Rd

Delete a case attribute

Usage

qc_delete_case_attribute(project, case_id, variable)

Arguments

project

A qc_project object.

case_id

Integer.

variable

Character. Attribute name to remove.

Value

Invisibly, TRUE.
